reason: Publish BatikCraft Studio 0.8.2: stage 2 step 1 of the canvas rework. Adds the RasterDocument model (ordered raster layers, active layer, canvas resize preserving pixels) and a viewport renderer that crops the visible region and scales it instead of looping objects. Render cost is flat regardless of stroke count: rendering a 1600x900 viewport from a 4096 canvas holding 50000 strokes takes about 4 ms. Still groundwork, not yet wired into the live canvas UI.
